---
title: "Projects"
format: html
page-layout: full
listing:
    contents: "."
    type: grid
    fields: [title, description, image]
    exclude:
        filename: "index.qmd"
---

My MSc in Business Analytics at Dublin City University has involved applied projects across CRM strategy, machine learning, and natural language processing. Each project below reflects hands-on analytical work combining technical and business thinking.
